runCase.gold: SELECT T1.`District Code`, T2.`NumGE1500`  FROM frpm AS T1 left JOIN satscores AS T2 on T1.CDSCode = T2.cds where T2.`NumGE1500` is NOT NULL and T1.`District Code` > 15
runCase.pred: SELECT T1.`District Code`, T2.`NumGE1500`  FROM frpm AS T1 left JOIN satscores AS T2 on T1.CDSCode = T2.cds where T2.`NumGE1500` is NOT NULL and T1.`District Code` > 16
